name: Cranberry Poppy Seed Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Egg Beaters (or other egg substitute)
1 cup Fresh or frozen cranberries, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pan and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, poppy seed, and baking powder.
4. Blend milk, margarine, egg substitute, vanilla, and lemon peel in another bowl.
5. Stir the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients just until moistened.
6. Fold in cranberries and spread evenly in the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 60-70 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool before serving. Optional: Drizzle with confectioner's sugar glaze if desired.
9. Makes 12 servings.
